Tenshō Shūbun

Winter and Spring Landscape
by Tenshō Shūbun
Japan, Muromachi period (1392–1573) · early to mid-1400s · Six-panel folding screen; ink and slight color on paper
←Soga Shōhaku Sakugen Shūryō→
